response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside diverse backend languages including Kotlin, Java, and Python. His work in AI-agent infrastructure and enterprise tooling aligns well with the role's advanced requirements. However, his primary stack experience is more backend-heavy, and his recent experience with Vitest is not explicitly mentioned.
strengths: Deep expertise in Node.js, TypeScript, and React with a focus on clean, testable code
Strong backend experience with multiple languages (Kotlin, Java, Python) and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP)
Proven leadership in AI-agent development and open-source contributions, demonstrating innovation and technical breadth
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Vitest (testing framework required for the role) though he mentions Jest and Playwright
More backend-focused in recent roles; frontend specialization may need assessment
Diverse technology stack could indicate less depth in the primary required stack (Nest.js, React, Vitest)
